title: Pre-allocate leaf value arrays in TreeRead.jl
description: Identified in profiling as major allocation source. TreeRead.jl:198 materialize_i2_values_v222 is ~55% of parse time. Pre-allocating arrays should reduce GC pressure.

title: Reduce dynamic array growth in tree building
description: Profiling shows push!/_growend! at ~12% of time. Pre-size vectors where possible or use sizehint!() to reduce reallocation during tree construction.

title: Fix v220 BoundsError in read_active_values
description: bunny_cloud.vdb (v220 format) crashes with BoundsError in read_active_values. The active_count from mask doesn't match actual compressed stream values. Need to investigate mask reading, file position tracking, and compression stream size calculation.

title: Use SVector for fixed-size leaf values
description: Leaf nodes have fixed 512 values. Consider using StaticArrays.jl SVector{512,T} instead of Vector{T} to eliminate heap allocation per leaf.
